honestlm 0.0.0.9001

Package index

All functions

anova(<honest_lm>)
Analysis of variance for a guarded linear model
as_honest_lm()
Add honest linear model behavior to an existing model
geom_lm_smooth()
Linear-model smooths with additive slopes by default
glance(<honest_lm>)
Glance at a guarded linear model
honest_lm()
Fit a guarded linear model
stat_lm_means()
Model-predicted means for categorical displays
summary(<honest_lm>)
Summarize a guarded linear model
tidy(<honest_lm>)
Tidy a guarded linear model
